ideation: This animation sequence depicts the act of dipping bread into fondue.  The movement should be smooth and deliberate, suggesting a careful and enjoyable process.  The left arm will hold the bread, while the right arm will be gently positioned near the fondue pot, ready to assist if needed.  The sequence will showcase the dipping motion and then a moment of savoring the fondue before returning to a relaxed pose. I will use the existing examples as a guide for smooth transitions and natural-looking arm movements.

frames.beat: arms rest, ready for a delicious dip
left arm extends, bringing bread closer
the bread dips into the warm fondue
arms return, savoring the cheesy goodness
